title: Garrett Langley Chris Carr Call Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All call logs, call records, or carrier billing records for any state-issued mobile device assigned to or used by Attorney General Chris Carr, reflecting any calls to or from Garrett Langley (CEO, Flock Safety - number previously provided), from January 1, 2026 through the date this request is processed.

To the extent any records are withheld in whole or in part, please identify each withheld record and cite the specific statutory exemption(s) under O.C.G.A. § 50-18-72 relied upon for each withholding.

As a preliminary matter, please confirm the make, model, and carrier of any state-issued mobile device(s) assigned to or used by Attorney General Chris Carr during the requested period, so that I may provide appropriate technical guidance for record retrieval if needed.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

title: Open Records Request – Flock Safety Emails

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Open Records Request – Flock Safety Emails
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails sent to or received from any email address at the domain @flocksafety.com, by any City of Dunwoody employee or official, that contain the word "YouTube" or the word "Jordan", or the word "YouTuber" from January 1, 2025 through the date this request is processed.

Please include all attachments associated with any responsive emails.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar

communications.subject: Michigan Freedom of Information Act Request: BSEED inspection reports
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Certificate of Compliance inspection reports for the following addresses:

-- River Pointe Tower (800 Dickerson Ave)
-- Cortez Apartments (329 & 381 Holbrook)
-- The Travel Inn (11560 Harper)

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry
